violations.text: The hand-washing sink in the kitchen was blocked by boxes. The handwashing sink at the bar was blocked by a perforated pan. A hand-washing sink shall be accessible at all times for employee use. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/08/2024

The door to the outside, located in the back, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 02/22/2024
Dishes were observed in mop sink. PIC informed to remove dishes and all washing aids at mop sink. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/08/2024
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the quaternary ammonium sanitizing solution for the 3 bay sink. New Violation. Correct By: 02/22/2024
